{{Quote|Where is Neva? I want her to run the genetic identificator on this head and prove it's a fake.|Peema Ahuff|<ref name="Star Wars: The Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
'''Neva''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] Alderaanian who lived during the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]] and worked as an assistant to [[Peema Ahuff]], the curator of the [[House Alde]] Royal Museum. In [[3643 BBY]] she was bribed by the gangster [[Skavak/Legends|Skavak]] as part of his scheme and was convinced to fake the genetic test results, identifying the head Skavak brought to Ahuff as belonging to [[Darth Bandon]]. After Skavak bartered the head for an [[Arkanian/Legends|Arkanian]] [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]], he convinced Neva to run away with him, but duped her shortly afterwards.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' {{Mo}}
